SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTILLO ORTEGA, PAULO C RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UDR, INC. $1,182.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,262.00, PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSIT WILL BE RESTORED BY UDR TO HIS ACCOUNT RETROACTICE AS TO THE DATE HE MOVED IN. DEFENDANT WILL PAY PLAINTIFF $80.00 IN COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
